overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets under elevated highways. The player character crosses intersections, walks through covered arcades, explores a dark underpass with an NCPD police checkpoint, and continues along commercial streets. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-quality ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

events.description: red vintage car drives through the intersection crossing the camera's path
camera turns left onto the sidewalk after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crosses the pedestrian crosswalk under the elevated highway and turns left onto the sidewalk

pedestrian in white jacket and red pants crossing the street

yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines
illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a night-time urban intersection beneath an elevated highway. The camera crosses the street as a red vintage car passes through, then turns left onto the sidewalk. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the area with pink and cyan light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead digital signage

events.description: approaching the entrance to a darker underpass area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk following pedestrians toward the underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead toward the underpass
pedestrian in white outfit standing near a street pole

entered.detail: patterned concrete paving stones with drainage grates
suspended advertising screens hanging from the highway structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway, following other pedestrians. The path is lined with digital billboards overhead and leads toward a darker underpass area where an NCPD vehicle is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass plaza with large digital billboards and police checkpoint

events.description: entering dark underpass illuminated only by large digital billboards and vehicle lights
camera begins circling around the parked NCPD armored vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaches the NCPD checkpoint and circles around the armored vehicle observing the officers and surroundings

notable_agents.action: NCPD armored vehicle with flashing caution text on side displays
armed NCPD officer standing guard beside the vehicle

entered.detail: massive illuminated screens displaying advertisements on the underpass walls
metal crowd control barriers surrounding the police vehicle
large tiled concrete surface of the underpass plaza

segments.scene_description: Entering a dark underpass plaza dominated by massive glowing digital billboards on the walls. An NCPD armored vehicle is parked in the center with officers standing guard. The camera circles the vehicle slowly, taking in the cyberpunk atmosphere of the police checkpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and elevated highway

events.description: exiting the dark underpass back into the neon-lit commercial street
vehicles passing on the street to the left as camera continues walking

agents.ego_description: walks past the police checkpoint and continues along the commercial street with shops

notable_agents.action: police officer working at a computer terminal near the street
group of pedestrians walking along the street in yellow and black clothing

entered.detail: storefronts with neon signage and glass windows
small trees with red foliage planted along the street
metal safety railing separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dark underpass behind, the scene returns to the neon-lit commercial street. The camera passes a police officer working at a terminal and continues along the sidewalk lined with decorative trees and shopfronts beneath the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching intersection with traffic

events.description: approaching intersection with crosswalk markings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the street approaching an intersection, following an NCPD officer ahead

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in tactical gear walking ahead on the sidewalk
black sedan driving on the street below the elevated highway

entered.detail: pedestrian crossing markings at the upcoming intersection
illuminated traffic signals hanging above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along the urban street toward an intersection, following an NCPD officer. Vehicles drive past on the left while the elevated highway structure continues overhead, and traffic lights become visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban district that dips into a dark police checkpoint before returning to a vibrant commercial street. It begins at a night-time intersection beneath an elevated highway, crossing the street past a red vintage car and turning onto a sidewalk illuminated by pink and cyan digital billboards. As the camera follows pedestrians along a covered walkway, the bright lights fade into a dark underpass plaza where the scene centers on a slow circle around a parked NCPD armored vehicle and its guards. The environment then shifts back toward the glow of the commercial district, passing a police officer at a terminal and moving along a sidewalk lined with decorative trees. Finally, the camera follows an officer toward a distant intersection as traffic flows past under the persistent shadow of the overhead highway.
